LanguageData.VVE_Charley.components.1.label: Back Wheel
LanguageData.VVE_Charley.components.2.label: Engine
LanguageData.VVE_Charley.components.3.label: Front Suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Charley.components.4.label: Back Suspension
LanguageData.VVE_Charley.description:
A general motorcycle, the Charley is a very effective single-person vehicle with a small cargo capacity. Performs well on any road except during winter season or snowy terrain, or both, with an increased speed on the world map.

Similar to other tier 2 vehicles, this has double fuel efficiency on the world map which makes them more efficient than tier 1 vehicles. They are also less visible due to improved manufacturing.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
LanguageData.VVE_Charley.label: Charley
LanguageData.VVE_Charley.properties.roles.0.label: Rider
